text.title: Preference-Trained Router Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure to emit a validated router-spec.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Step 1 — Collect preference data. Sample N>=1000 prompts; run both weak + strong; jury-label which is acceptable (r2).
Step 2 — Train binary classifier (logistic on embeddings or small-BERT). Track ROC-AUC + calibration.
Step 3 — Calibrate threshold on held-out so strong-accuracy regression <= 5% (r3). Set uncertainty_band default 0.1 (r4).
Step 4 — Deploy with drift monitor (rolling jury sample, retrain on agreement drop). Emit spec; run scripts/validate-preference-trained-router.py.
